name: Lauren Fields
tagline: Mass spectrometry, neuropeptidomics, and structural proteomics
_comment_exclusions: OpenAlex merges distinct researchers who share a name into one author profile. These works are returned under the ORCID above but are NOT Lauren Fields' work, or are duplicate deposits of a work already in the list. Verified and excluded 2026-07-22.

excluded_works.note: Kluyveromyces secretome (PROTEOMICS) - New England Biolabs, first author Catherine Madinger
Constitutive secretion in Tetrahymena thermophila - first author Catherine Madinger
Methylcytosine discrimination via nanopores (JACS, 170 citations) - Boston University / Penn, first author Meni Wanunu
Body size and shape (Biol. J. Linnean Soc.) - first author Daniel Welsh
Antarctic Trematomus antifreeze activity - Univ. of Illinois, a different Lauren Fields (confirmed by LF 2026-07-22)
Environmental temperature and Antarctic fish antifreeze - same different Lauren Fields
Figshare deposit of the ACS Chem. Neurosci. paper 'Neuropeptide Diversity Encoded in Newly Sequenced Crustacean Genomes'

_comment_preprints: bioRxiv entries are genuine standalone works, not preprints of the journal papers listed alongside them. In particular 'EndoGenius: Enabling comprehensive identification and quantitation' (bioRxiv 2025) is a sequel to 'EndoGenius: Optimized Neuropeptide Identification' (J. Proteome Res. 2024), not a preprint of it. Both are kept.
_comment_co_first: Shared first authorship is declared in the paper itself ('these authors contributed equally') and appears in NO bibliographic API - not OpenAlex, not ORCID, not Crossref. Author order alone cannot distinguish a co-first author from a second author, so these must be listed by hand. Add the OpenAlex work ID here when a paper names you as co-first. Confirmed by LF 2026-07-22.

co_first_author_works.note: MotifQuest (JASMS 2024) - co-first with Tina C. Dang
An Updated Guide to the Crustacean Neuropeptidome (Methods Mol. Biol. 2024) - co-first with Wenxin Wu
cNPDB (bioRxiv 2025) - three co-first authors: Vu Ngoc Huong Tran, Thao Duong, and Lauren Fields
